---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Felix Ramirez Mota"
date: "2026-04-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
getwd()
library("readxl")

mass_arrests <- read_excel("/Users/felixramirez/Desktop/DACSS_690V/DACSS_690VHW3/Mass_Arrests.xlsx")

head(mass_arrests)

```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
